steps.title: Substitute the line
steps.content:
Rewrite the second equation as $y=8x-9$, then substitute into the quadratic equation.
$x^2+4x-5=8x-9$

steps.title: Count the solutions
steps.content:
Move all terms to one side and factor.
$x^2-4x+4=0$
$(x-2)^2=0$
The repeated factor gives exactly one solution to the system. The answer is C.
